seoTitle: Greta vs Greta Main — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Greta and Greta Main. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Greta vs Greta Main: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Greta and Greta Main.
heading: Greta vs Greta Main — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Greta, New South Wales and Greta Main, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Greta has a lower overall climate risk score (40/100) compared to Greta Main (44/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Greta or Greta Main safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Greta has a flood risk score of 28/100, while Greta Main scores 30/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Greta scores 34/100 for bushfire risk. Greta Main scores 50/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Greta or Greta Main?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Greta has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.08% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
